geo_loc_name: USA: The Coastal Waters of Southeast Alaska

samp_store_method_additional: Stored in a 250-500 mL transparent Nalgene bottle
nucl_acid_ext_kit: Qiagen DNeasy Blood and Tissue Kit
nucl_acid_ext_modify: Modified for disc filters, reagent volume altered
concentration_method: Qubit Fluorometer v.4 dsDNA high sensitivity kit
nucl_acid_ext_method_additional: Extractions completed in a Biosafety Cabinet for sterility purposes.
temp_method: not applicable
wind_speed_method: Calculated from the average of the three wind speeds recorded. If wind_speed_standard_deviation is not applicable, then only one wind speed was recorded or no wind_speed was recorded.
